PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?team ?teamLabel ?generalManager ?generalManagerLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q318389 wdt:P527 ?division .
  ?division wdt:P463 ?team .
  ?team wdt:P505 ?generalManager .
  ?team rdfs:label ?teamLabel .
  ?generalManager rdfs:label ?generalManagerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?teamLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(LANG(?generalManagerLabel) = 'en')
}
